tasks.title: Initialize Development Environment and Core Smart Contract Foundation
tasks.description: Set up the foundational development infrastructure and implement the core SuperPaymaster contract with basic ERC-4337 Paymaster functionality
tasks.details: Create Hardhat/Foundry project structure with proper tooling (testing, deployment, verification). Implement core SuperPaymaster.sol contract inheriting from BasePaymaster (ERC-4337). Include validatePaymasterUserOp function for basic gas payment validation, emergency pause functionality via OpenZeppelin's Pausable, and multi-signature governance setup. Set up comprehensive test suite using Foundry/Hardhat with unit tests for all core functions. Configure deployment scripts for testnet (Goerli/Sepolia) with proper environment variable management. Implement basic token support for ETH and one ERC-20 token (USDC). Add gas optimization patterns to keep overhead under 21,000 gas per transaction as specified in PRD.
tasks.testStrategy: Deploy to testnet and verify basic paymaster functionality works with Account Abstraction wallets. Test gas cost optimization with target <21,000 gas overhead. Validate emergency pause mechanisms and multi-sig governance. Run comprehensive unit and integration tests achieving >95% code coverage.

tasks.title: Implement Quote Aggregation System and Multi-Paymaster Support
tasks.description: Build the competitive pricing engine that aggregates quotes from multiple Paymaster providers and implements automated selection logic
tasks.details: Create QuoteAggregator.sol contract with quote request/response protocol. Implement off-chain quote collection service using Node.js/TypeScript with WebSocket connections for real-time quotes. Build quote ranking algorithm considering price, reputation score, and response time with <500ms aggregation target. Implement automatic Paymaster selection based on best quote. Create PaymasterRegistry.sol for permissionless Paymaster registration with metadata storage (supported tokens, pricing models, reputation scores). Add quote validation mechanisms to prevent manipulation and ensure quote freshness (max 30-second validity). Implement fallback mechanisms for quote failures.
tasks.testStrategy: Set up multiple mock Paymaster services for testing quote aggregation. Verify quote selection algorithm chooses optimal Paymaster based on price and reputation. Test system performance under high load with target <2s total response time. Validate quote freshness and manipulation prevention mechanisms.

tasks.title: Develop Gas Card Pre-payment System with Multi-Token Support
tasks.description: Create the user-friendly Gas Card system that abstracts gas payments into familiar prepaid card metaphors with support for various ERC-20 tokens
tasks.details: Implement GasCardManager.sol contract for pre-paid gas balance management using ERC-20 token standards. Create gas credit system with 1:1 gas credit to wei conversion for simplicity. Build token conversion integration with Uniswap V3 SDK for automated token-to-ETH swapping. Implement auto-reload functionality with user-configurable thresholds and maximum amounts. Add usage tracking and analytics with events for balance changes, transactions, and conversions. Create Gas Card UI components (React.js) with familiar payment card UX patterns showing balance, recent transactions, and top-up options. Implement support for major ERC-20 tokens (USDC, USDT, DAI) with configurable token list.
tasks.testStrategy: Test gas card creation, funding, and usage flows with various ERC-20 tokens. Verify accurate token conversion rates using DEX integration. Test auto-reload functionality with different threshold scenarios. Validate UI components for intuitive user experience and ensure gas credit accounting accuracy.

tasks.title: Build SDSS Registry System for Decentralized Service Discovery
tasks.description: Implement the Standardized Decentralized Service System (SDSS) using ENS for permissionless Paymaster discovery and reputation management
tasks.details: Create SDSSRegistry.sol contract leveraging ENS for decentralized service registration. Implement service discovery protocol allowing Paymasters to register via ENS subdomains (paymaster.service.eth). Build reputation system tracking Paymaster performance metrics (success rate, response time, cost efficiency) stored on-chain with weighted scoring algorithm. Create service metadata standards including supported tokens, pricing models, API endpoints, and service capabilities. Implement service binding mechanism for secure communication between wallets and Paymasters. Add reputation oracle functionality for aggregating performance data and updating scores. Build automated service health monitoring with uptime tracking and quality metrics.
tasks.testStrategy: Deploy ENS-based registry on testnet and verify service registration/discovery works correctly. Test reputation scoring algorithm with simulated Paymaster performance data. Validate service metadata standards and binding mechanisms. Ensure system maintains >99.9% availability for service discovery with response times <100ms.

tasks.title: Create Integration SDK and Developer Tools with Wallet Integration
tasks.description: Develop comprehensive SDK, documentation, and integration tools for wallet developers and DApp builders, including AirAccount integration via SDSS
tasks.details: Build TypeScript SDK with methods for quote requests, gas card management, and Paymaster interaction. Create React components for gas payment UI including quote display, token selection, and transaction confirmation. Implement AirAccount integration using SDSS service binding for seamless semi-custody wallet support. Develop comprehensive documentation with integration guides, API reference, and code examples. Create developer dashboard for monitoring gas payments, analyzing usage patterns, and managing Paymaster configurations. Build deployment scripts and tools for easy integration with existing DApps. Add webhook API for real-time transaction status updates. Implement rate limiting and API key management for production usage. Create example integrations demonstrating common use cases.
tasks.testStrategy: Test SDK with multiple wallet implementations including MetaMask and AirAccount. Verify React components work across different DApp environments. Validate AirAccount integration provides seamless user experience with enhanced security. Test developer dashboard functionality and ensure comprehensive monitoring capabilities. Deploy example integrations and validate end-to-end user flows achieve target 70.1% step reduction.
